description: Portable example: one realistic multi-core profile per cloud service.

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-redis {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.10 ${DOCKER_REDIS_IMAGE:-redis:7.2-alpine} redis-server --save '' --appendonly no --maxmemory 4gb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-nginx {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.11 -v {project_dir}/www:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro -v {project_dir}/cloud_bench_configs/nginx-http.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template:ro ${DOCKER_NGINX_IMAGE:-nginx:alpine} sh -lc 'sed -E "s/^worker_processes[[:space:]].*;/worker_processes 8;/" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template > /tmp/nginx.conf && exec nginx -c /tmp/nginx.conf -g "daemon off;"'

helper_roles.name: nginx_backend
helper_roles.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-nginx-helper {helper_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.11 -v {project_dir}/www:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro -v {project_dir}/cloud_bench_configs/nginx-http.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template:ro ${DOCKER_NGINX_IMAGE:-nginx:alpine} sh -lc 'sed -E "s/^worker_processes[[:space:]].*;/worker_processes 8;/" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template > /tmp/nginx.conf && exec nginx -c /tmp/nginx.conf -g "daemon off;"'

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-haproxy {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.14 -v {project_dir}/cloud_bench_configs/haproxy-http.cfg:/tmp/haproxy.cfg.template:ro ${DOCKER_HAPROXY_IMAGE:-haproxy:2.8} sh -lc 'sed "/^global/a\\    nbthread 8" /tmp/haproxy.cfg.template > /tmp/haproxy.cfg && exec haproxy -W -db -f /tmp/haproxy.cfg'

helper_roles.name: loadgen
helper_roles.start_cmd: docker run -d --name helper-postgres-loadgen {helper_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net -e PGPASSWORD=password ${DOCKER_POSTGRES_IMAGE:-postgres:15-alpine} sleep infinity

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-postgres {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.16 -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=password ${DOCKER_POSTGRES_IMAGE:-postgres:15-alpine} postgres -c shared_buffers=4GB -c max_connections=200

prepare_steps.name: initialize pgbench scale 20
prepare_steps.cmd: docker exec helper-postgres-loadgen pgbench -i -s 20 -h 172.30.0.16 -U postgres postgres

postgres.load_cmd: docker exec helper-postgres-loadgen pgbench -c 32 -j 8 -T {bench_duration} -h 172.30.0.16 -U postgres postgres

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-mysql {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.12 -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=password -e MYSQL_DATABASE=test ${DOCKER_MYSQL_IMAGE:-mysql:8.0} --innodb-buffer-pool-size=4G --max-connections=256

prepare_steps.cmd: docker exec bench-client sh -lc "set -e; sysbench oltp_read_write --db-driver=mysql --mysql-host=172.30.0.12 --mysql-user=root --mysql-password=password --mysql-db=test --mysql-ssl=off --tables=16 --table-size=100000 --threads=32 prepare"

mysql.load_cmd: docker exec bench-client sh -lc "set -e; sysbench oltp_read_write --db-driver=mysql --mysql-host=172.30.0.12 --mysql-user=root --mysql-password=password --mysql-db=test --mysql-ssl=off --tables=16 --table-size=100000 --threads=32 --time={bench_duration} --report-interval=10 run; sysbench oltp_read_write --db-driver=mysql --mysql-host=172.30.0.12 --mysql-user=root --mysql-password=password --mysql-db=test --mysql-ssl=off --tables=16 --table-size=100000 --threads=32 cleanup >/dev/null"

helper_roles.name: loadgen
helper_roles.start_cmd: CLAB_IMAGE=${DCPERF_V2_TAO_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed-tools} DCPERF_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf LOADGEN_CONTAINER=helper-taobench-loadgen LOADGEN_CPUSET={helper_cpuset} LOADGEN_MEMS=0 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/containers/create_taobench_loadgen.sh

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CLAB_IMAGE=${DCPERF_V2_TAO_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed-tools} DCPERF_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} SERVER_MEMS=0 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/containers/create_taobench_server.sh && DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server TAO_MEMSIZE=16 TAO_SERVER_PORT=11211 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/taobench/start_server.sh /workspace/results/taobench_cloud_server.log 300 1800

taobench.load_cmd: DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server LOADGEN_CONTAINER=helper-taobench-loadgen CLIENT_WARMUP_TIME=300 CLIENT_WAIT_AFTER_WARMUP=5 TAO_MEMSIZE=16 TAO_SERVER_PORT=11211 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/taobench/run_client.sh 16 {bench_duration} /tmp/taobench-v2-clients16.log

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: DCPERF_V2_IMAGE=${DCPERF_V2_FEEDSIM_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed-tools} DCPERF_V2_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} FEEDSIM_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-feedsim-server FEEDSIM_SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} FEEDSIM_SERVER_MEMS=0 FEEDSIM_SERVER_PORT=11222 FEEDSIM_SERVER_MONITOR_PORT=10222 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/feedsim/start_split_server.sh
